products.name: Operra
products.tagline: Modern operations platform for workflows, approvals, and automation
products.description: Operra is Ventryx's flagship business operations platform built to help organizations manage workflows, approvals, internal tools, analytics, and automation from one central system.

features.label: Workflows
features.description: Design and automate multi-step business workflows with routing, conditions, and triggers.

features.label: Approvals
features.description: Structured approval routing with escalation rules, deadlines, and audit trails.

features.label: Analytics
features.description: Operational reporting, usage metrics, activity logs, and business insights.

features.label: Automation
features.description: Rules-based automation engine for notifications, task triggers, and system events.

features.label: Admin Console
features.description: Centralized admin panel for managing users, permissions, settings, and platform configuration.

features.label: Internal Dashboards
features.description: Customizable dashboards for operational visibility across teams and processes.

platform_capabilities.label: API Infrastructure
platform_capabilities.description: Design, manage, and scale application interfaces for modern products and internal systems.

platform_capabilities.label: Authentication
platform_capabilities.description: Secure access control, identity management, and protected workflows across your platform.

platform_capabilities.label: Automation
platform_capabilities.description: Streamline repetitive operations with triggers, rules, notifications, and workflow orchestration.

platform_capabilities.label: Data Pipelines
platform_capabilities.description: Move, structure, and monitor operational data across services, tools, and business processes.

platform_capabilities.label: Security
platform_capabilities.description: Build with strong controls, auditability, reliability, and modern security-first practices.

platform_capabilities.label: Observability
platform_capabilities.description: Track events, monitor systems, and understand platform health with operational visibility.
